scripts.deploy:dev: astro build --mode dev && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name revive-web --branch dev
scripts.deploy:staging: astro build --mode staging && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name revive-web --branch staging
scripts.deploy:production: astro build --mode production && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name revive-web --branch main
